kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=maSession, url=https://api.chucknorris.io, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://api.chucknorris.io/jokes/categories path_url=/jokes/categories headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=https://api.chucknorris.io/jokes/categories status=200, reason=OK headers={'Date': 'Fri, 27 Feb 2026 11:01:37 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Nel': '{"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1}', 'Report-To': '{"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=rdG0edLwgmp9zXsCD2jnE3fap6JvzAGpyfCXuALLwSE%3D\\u0026sid=812dcc77-0bd0-43b1-a5f1-b25750382959\\u0026ts=1772190097"}],"max_age":3600}', 'Reporting-Endpoints': 'heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=rdG0edLwgmp9zXsCD2jnE3fap6JvzAGpyfCXuALLwSE%3D&sid=812dcc77-0bd0-43b1-a5f1-b25750382959&ts=1772190097"', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'Vary': 'Origin, Access-Control-Request-Method, Access-Control-Request-Headers', 'Via': '1.1 heroku-router', 'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY', 'cf-cache-status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Content-Encoding': 'gzip', 'CF-RAY': '9d472f6f4cb9d3f8-CDG', 'alt-svc': 'h3=":443"; ma=86400'} body=["animal","career","celebrity","dev","explicit","fashion","food","history","money","movie","music","political","religion","science","sport","travel"]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
